creator: tobez@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This port requires XML-Handler-Trees, which does not exist in the ports 
collection.  Did you intend to submit this port as well? 

This port requires version 1.06 of XML-Simple, while our port tree 
contains 1.05.  I guess the upgrade to the most recent version of 
XML-Simple is in order.
